ocr.text: The analysis covers two tables detailing various metrics and respondent categories. In Table 1, under the header "Subscale," the
rows labeled "Positive impact," "Negative impact," "Positive support," "Negative support," "Positive dimensions," and
"Negative dimensions" present internal consistency Cronbach α values of 0.96, 0.96, 0.61, 0.67, 0.92, and 0.84, respectively,
while test-retest reliability Pearson / ICC values are 0.93**/0.962, 0.84**/0.903, 0.52*/0.557, 0.72**/0.783, 0.66**/0.787, and
0.77**/0.857. Table 2 includes the header "Activity," with the first row labeled "In-depth interviews (audio-recorded)" at Study
Site 1, gathering a total of 223 respondents from categories including Senior scientists, Counselors, Nurses, Clinicians,
Community mobilisers, and Trial participants, with gender distribution of MM, FFMM7M, 6F.
Subscale  Internal consistency Cronbach α  Test-retest reliability Pearson / ICC
Positive impact  0.96  0.93**/ 0.962
Negative impact  0.96  0.84**/ 0.903
Positive support  0.61  0.52*/ 0,557
Negative support  0.67  0.72**/ 0,783
Positive dimensions  0.92  0.66**/ 0.787
Negative dimensions  0.84  0.77**/ 0,857
Activity  Study Site  Category of respondent  No. of respondents  Gender

Short interview  Spouses  4  3M, 1F
The second row also features "In-depth interviews (audio-recorded)" at Study Site 2, with 122 respondents across similar
categories, gender distribution MM, FFF, M3M, 8F. The third row, "In-depth interview(audio recorded)," at the REC site,
encompasses 5 respondents, with gender as 3M, 2F. The fourth row, "Focus group discussions(audio recorded)," at Study Site
12, includes 914 respondents from Trial participants and CAB, with gender distribution as 4M, 5F, 7M, 8F, 1M, 6F. The final
row, "Short interview," includes 4 spouses, with gender as 3M, 1F.
